methods.description: Process for preparing smear slides for nannofossil observation and analysis.

steps.description: Smear slides were prepared following Bown and Young [18].
steps.searchable_summary: prepare smear slides for nannofossil analysis

methods.description: Observation and identification of nannofossil specimens to determine stratigraphic distribution and abundance.

steps.description: Calcareous nannofossils were examined under an Olympus BX53-P polarized light microscope with an oil-immersion objective lens at a magnification of 1000×.
Two hundred nannofossil specimens were identified and counted in straight transect across the micro slide to clarify the stratigraphic distribution of each species and its relative abundance.
Additional observation were made along four to five other transects to investigate occurrences of other rare species.
steps.searchable_summary: observe additional transects for rare species

methods.description: Measurement of coccolith size of genera Reticulofenestra to characterize stratigraphic size distribution.

steps.description: The coccolith size of genera Reticulofenestra was measured to characterize the stratigraphic size distribution throughout the interval.
steps.searchable_summary: measure coccolith size for stratigraphic distribution

methods.description: Correlation of nannofossil assemblage data with isotope oxygen stratigraphy, MS, and NGR records to discuss paleoceanographic conditions.

steps.description: Correlated the selected calcareous nannofossil assemblage with isotope oxygen stratigraphy [17], MS and NGR records [16].
steps.searchable_summary: correlate nannofossil data with isotope and geophysical records
